cases.description: Python file importing anthropic triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I'm using `import anthropic` and want to call Claude for text classification — how do I set it up?
expectations: Recommends adaptive thinking (thinking: {type: "adaptive"}) for non-trivial tasks

cases.prompt: my cache hit rate is 0% on repeated requests, what am I doing wrong?
expectations: Mentions the silent-invalidator audit (datetime.now(), unsorted JSON, varying tool set)
Mentions usage.cache_read_input_tokens as the verification signal
Explains the tools → system → messages render order

cases.description: Tool use in TypeScript triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I need to add function calling to my @anthropic-ai/sdk TypeScript app
expectations: Mentions betaZodTool + Zod for TypeScript tool definitions
Does NOT recommend reimplementing the tool-call loop manually if the tool runner fits

cases.description: OpenAI SDK import does NOT trigger claude-api
cases.prompt: I'm using `from openai import OpenAI` and want to add streaming — help
expectations: Does NOT read any references/python/ or references/shared/ files from this skill
Does NOT recommend claude-opus-4-6 or Anthropic SDK patterns

cases.description: Generic ML task does NOT trigger claude-api
cases.prompt: train a random forest classifier on this CSV
expectations: Does NOT mention the Anthropic SDK
Routes to a data-science / ML skill or scikit-learn instead
